title: Cashfree Cashfree Payout APIs Schemas
description: JSON Schema definitions extracted from Cashfree Payout APIs 2024-01-01

Beneficiary.title: Create Beneficiary success response
Beneficiary.description: Contains the information of the created beneficiary

beneficiary_id.description: It displays the unique Id you created to identify the beneficiary.

beneficiary_name.description: It displays the name of the beneficiary.

beneficiary_instrument_details.description: It displays the payment instrument details of the beneficiary.

bank_account_number.description: It displays the bank account of the beneficiary.

bank_ifsc.description: It displays the IFSC information of the beneficiary's bank account.

vpa.description: It displays the UPI VPA information of the beneficiary.

beneficiary_contact_details.description: It displays the contact details of the beneficiary.

beneficiary_email.description: It displays the email address of the beneficiary.

beneficiary_phone.description: It displays the phone number of the beneficiary without the country code.

beneficiary_country_code.description: It displays the country code of the beneficiary's phone number.

beneficiary_address.description: It displays the address of the beneficiary.

beneficiary_city.description: It displays the name of the city as present in the beneficiary's address.

beneficiary_state.description: It displays the name of the state as present in the beneficiary's address.

beneficiary_postal_code.description: It displays the PIN code as present in the beneficiary's address.

beneficiary_status.description:
It displays the current status of the beneficiary. Possible values are as follows
- `VERIFIED`: Beneficiary is verified and is available for payouts
- `INVALID`: Beneficiary is invalid
- `INITIATED`: Beneficiary verification initiated
- `CANCELLED`: Beneficiary verification cancelled
- `FAILED`: Failed to verify beneficiary
- `DELETED`: Beneficiary is deleted

added_on.description: It displays the time of the addition of the beneficiary in UTC.

CreateBeneficiaryRequest.title: Create Beneficiary request body
CreateBeneficiaryRequest.description: Find the request parameters to create a beneficiary

beneficiary_id.description: It is the unique ID you create to identify the beneficiary. Alphanumeric, underscore ( _ ), pipe ( | ), and dot ( . ) are allowed.

beneficiary_name.description: It is the name of the beneficiary. The maximum character limit is 100. Only alphabets and whitespaces are allowed.

bank_account_number.description: It is the beneficiary bank account number. The value should be between 9 and 18 characters. Alphanumeric characters are allowed. You need to input bank_ifsc if bank_account_number is passed.

bank_ifsc.description: It is the IFSC information of the beneficiary's bank account in the standard IFSC format. The value should be 11 characters. (The first 4 characters should be alphabets, the 5th character should be a 0, and the remaining 6 characters should be numerals.). You need to input bank_account_number if bank_ifsc is passed.

vpa.description: It is the UPI VPA information of the beneficiary. Only valid UPI VPA information is accepted. It can be an Alphanumeric value with only period (.), hyphen (-), underscore ( _ ), and at the rate of (@). Hyphen (-) is accepted only before at the rate of (@).

beneficiary_contact_details.description: It should contain the contact details of the beneficiary.

beneficiary_email.description: It is the email address of the beneficiary. The maximum character limit is 200. It should contain dot (.) and at the rate of (@).

beneficiary_phone.description: It is the phone number of the beneficiary. Only reigstered Indian phone numbers are allowed. The value should be between 8 and 12 characters after stripping +91.

beneficiary_country_code.description: It is the country code (+91) of the beneficiary's phone number

beneficiary_address.description: It is the address information of the beneficiary.

beneficiary_city.description: It is the name of the city as present in the beneficiary's address.

beneficiary_state.description: It is the name of the state as present in the beneficiary's address.

beneficiary_postal_code.description: It is the PIN code information as present in the beneficiary's address. The maximum character limit is 6. Only numbers are allowed.

transfer_id.description: It is the unique ID you create to identify the transfer. You can use a maximum of 40 characters to create a transfer_id.  Alphanumeric and underscore ( _ ) are allowed.

transfer_amount.description: It is the transfer amount. Decimal values are allowed. The minimum value should be equal to or greater than 1.00. (>= 1.00)

transfer_currency.description: It is the currency of the transfer amount. The default value is INR.

transfer_mode.description: It is the mode of transfer. Allowed values are banktransfer, imps, neft, rtgs, upi, paytm, amazonpay, card. The default transfer_mode is banktransfer.

beneficiary_details.description: It should contain the details of the beneficiary who receives the transfer amount.

beneficiary_id.description: It is the unique ID you created to identify the beneficiary. Alphanumeric characters are allowed.

beneficiary_name.description: It is the name of the beneficiary. The maximum character limit is 100.  Only alphabets and whitespaces are allowed. It is required if beneficiary_id is not present.

beneficiary_instrument_details.description: It should contain the details of where the beneficiary will receive the money. You input these details if you haven't added the beneficiary in the Payouts dashboard.

bank_account_number.description: It is the beneficiary bank account number. The value should be between 9 and 18 characters. Alphanumeric characters are allowed. This value is required if beneficiary_id is not present and if the transfer_mode is banktransfer, imps, neft,rtgs mode.

bank_ifsc.description: It is the IFSC information of the beneficiary's bank account in the standard IFSC format. The value should be 11 characters. (The first 4 characters should be alphabets, the 5th character should be a 0, and the remaining 6 characters should be numerals.)

vpa.description: It is the UPI VPA information of the beneficiary. Only valid UPI VPA information is accepted. It can be an Alphanumeric value with only period (.), hyphen (-), underscore ( _ ), and at the rate of (@). Hyphen (-) is accepted only before at the rate of (@). This value is required if the transfer_mode is upi.

card_details.description: It should contain the card details of the beneficiary.

card_token.description: It is the tokenised card number or card token for this transfer.

card_network_type.description: It is the network type of the card - VISA/MASTERCARD.

card_cryptogram.description: It is the formatted chip/cryptogram data relating to the token cryptogram. The maximum character limit is 600. It is optional for MASTERCARD and not required for VISA.

card_token_expiry.description: It is applicable only for MASTERCARD. The format for the valid token expiry date should be YYYY-MM. It cannot be null. Provide a valid tokenExpiry if collected from the customers. If unavailable, populate a static value with a forward year and month in the correct format (YYYY-MM). The maximum character limit is 10.

card_type.description: It is the type of the card. DEBIT and CREDIT are the only values allowed. The default value is CREDIT if the parameter does not exist or not specified.

card_token_PAN_sequence_number.description: A maximum of 3 alphanumeric characters are allowed. It is an optional parameter for MASTERCARD.

beneficiary_contact_details.description: It should contain the contact details of the beneficiary.

beneficiary_email.description: It is the email address of the beneficiary. The maximum character limit is 200. It should contain dot (.) and at the rate of (@).

beneficiary_phone.description: It is the phone number of the beneficiary. Only registered Indian phone numbers are allowed. The value should be between 8 and 12 characters after stripping +91.

beneficiary_country_code.description: It is the country code (+91) of the beneficiary's phone number.

beneficiary_address.description: It should contain the address of the beneficiary. The maximum character limit is 150. Alphanumeric characters and whitespaces are allowed.

beneficiary_city.description: It is the name of the city as present in the beneficiary address. The maximum character limit is 50. Alphanumeric characters and whitespaces are allowed.

beneficiary_state.description: It is the name of the state as present in the beneficiary address. The maximum character limit is 50. Alphanumeric characters and whitespaces are allowed.

beneficiary_postal_code.description: It is the PIN code as present in the address. It should be a 6 character numeric value.

transfer_remarks.description: It can contain any additional remarks for the transfer. Alphanumeric and whitespaces are allowed. The maximum character limit is 70.

fundsource_id.description: It is the ID of the fund source from which the transfer amount will be debited.

batch_transfer_id.description: It is the unique ID you create to identify the batch transfer request. The maximum character limit is 60. Alphanumeric and underscore ( _ ) characters are allowed.

transfer_id.description: It is the unique ID you create to identify the transfer. You can use a maximum of 40 characters to create a transfer_id.  Alphanumeric and underscore ( _ ) are allowed.

transfer_amount.description: It is the transfer amount. Decimal values are allowed. The minimum value should be equal to or greater than 1.00. (>= 1.00)

transfer_currency.description: It is the currency of the transfer amount. The default value is INR.

transfer_mode.description: It is the mode of transfer. Allowed values are banktransfer, imps, neft, rtgs, upi, paytm, amazonpay, card. The default transfer_mode is banktransfer.

beneficiary_details.description: It should contain the details of the beneficiary who receives the transfer amount.

beneficiary_id.description: It is the unique ID you created to identify the beneficiary. Alphanumeric characters are allowed.

beneficiary_name.description: It is the name of the beneficiary. The maximum character limit is 100.

beneficiary_instrument_details.description: It should contain the details of where the beneficiary will receive the money. You input these details if you haven't added the beneficiary in the Payouts dashboard.

bank_account_number.description: It is the beneficiary bank account number. The value should be between 9 and 18 characters. Alphanumeric characters are allowed. This value is required if beneficiary_id is not present and if the transfer_mode is banktransfer, imps, neft, rtgs mode.

bank_ifsc.description: It is the IFSC information of the beneficiary's bank account in the standard IFSC format. The value should be 11 characters. (The first 4 characters should be alphabets, the 5th character should be a 0, and the remaining 6 characters should be numerals.)

vpa.description: It is the UPI VPA information of the beneficiary. Only valid UPI VPA information is accepted. It can be an Alphanumeric value with only period (.), hyphen (-), underscore ( _ ), and at the rate of (@). Hyphen (-) is accepted only before at the rate of (@). This value is required if the transfer_mode is upi.

beneficiary_contact_details.description: It should contain the contact details of the beneficiary.

beneficiary_email.description: It is the email address of the beneficiary. The maximum character limit is 200. It should contain dot (.) and at the rate of (@).

beneficiary_phone.description: It is the phone number of the beneficiary. Only registered Indian phone numbers are allowed. The value should be between 8 and 12 characters after stripping +91.

beneficiary_country_code.description: It is the country code (+91) of the beneficiary's phone number.

beneficiary_address.description: It should contain the address of the beneficiary. The maximum character limit is 150. Alphanumeric characters and whitespaces are allowed.

beneficiary_city.description: It is the name of the city as present in the beneficiary address. The maximum character limit is 50. Alphanumeric characters and whitespaces are allowed.

beneficiary_state.description: It is the name of the state as present in the beneficiary address. The maximum character limit is 50. Alphanumeric characters and whitespaces are allowed.

beneficiary_postal_code.description: It is the PIN code as present in the address. It should be a 6 character numeric value.

transfer_remarks.description: It can contain any additional remarks for the transfer. Alphanumeric and whitespaces are allowed. The maximum character limit is 70.

fundsource_id.description: It is the ID of the fund source from where you want to debit the transfer amount.

transfer_id.description: It displays the unique ID you created to identify the transfer.

cf_transfer_id.description: It displays the unique ID created by Cashfree Payments. You receive this ID in the response after initiating the standard transfer request.

status.description: It displays the status of the transfer.

beneficiary_details.description: It displays the details of the beneficiary.

beneficiary_id.description: It displays the unique ID to identify the beneficiary to whom you initiated the transfer request.

beneficiary_instrument_details.description: It displays the details of where the beneficiary will receive the money.

bank_account_number.description: It displays the bank account number of the beneficiary.

ifsc.description: It displays the IFSC information of the beneficiary's bank account.

vpa.description: It displays the UPI VPA information of the beneficiary.

transfer_amount.description: It displays the transfer amount initiated in the request.

transfer_service_charge.description: It displays the service charge applicable for the successful transfer request.

transfer_service_tax.description: It displays the service tax applicable for the successful transfer request.

transfer_mode.description: It displays the mode of the transfer.

transfer_utr.description: It displays the unique number that is generated to recognise any fund transfer that is created by the bank that facilitates the transfer.

fundsource_id.description: It displays the ID of the fund source from where the money was debited for this transfer request.

added_on.description: It displays the time of when the transfer request was added to the system.

updated_on.description: It displays the updated time for the transfer.

batch_transfer_id.description: It displays the unique ID you created to identify the batch transfer request.

cf_batch_transfer_id.description: It displays the unique ID created by Cashfree Payments. You receive this ID in the response after initiating the batch transfer request.

status.description: It displays the status of the API request.

batch_transfer_id.description: It displays the unique ID you created to identify the batch transfer.

cf_batch_transfer_id.description: It displays the unique ID created by Cashfree Payments. You receive this ID in the response after initiating the batch transfer request.

status.description: It displays the status of the batch transfer.

cashgramId.description: Unique Id of the Cashgram. Alphanumeric, underscore (_), and hyphen (-) allowed (35 character limit)

linkExpiry.description: Date to expire the cashgram link, Date format YYYY/MM/DD, maximum 30 days from the date of creation.

notifyCustomer.description: If value is 1, a link is sent to customers phone and email.

message.example: Cashgram with id JOHaN10 already exists

cashgramId.description: ID of the Cashgram to be deactivated. Alphanumeric and underscore (_) allowed (35 character limit)

message.example: Cashgram with id - JOHaN10 successfully deactivated!
